Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows severe renal impairment (markedly elevated creatinine), mild leukopenia, and abnormal platelet indices (increased mean and distribution width), which may indicate altered platelet production or activation. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, and red cell indices, are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and further nephrological and hematological evaluation are recommended.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
